name: AC BTU Calculator
seo_title: AC BTU Calculator – What Size Do I Need?
seo_description: Find out how many BTU your air conditioner needs by room size, ceiling height and sun exposure. Free AC sizing calculator with instant results.

range_hints.area_m2: Floor area to condition (5-500 m²). Bedroom: 10-20 m², Living room: 25-40 m², Office: 30-60 m²
range_hints.altura_m: Ceiling height. Residential: 2.5-2.7 m, Commercial: 3-4 m

result_context: Habitación of {area_m2}m² with {height_m}m of height requires equipo of {btu} BTU/h ({toneladas} toneladas). power electrical: {power_kw} kW.
formula_display: BTU = area × height × factor (40-60 according to orientación/insulation)
steps: Factor orientación sur + insulation bueno: 50 BTU/m³
To m² method fast: 25m² × 600 BTU/m² = 15000 BTU/h
mistakes: Dimensionar solo per m² without Consider height and orientación
Not prever capacity additional to techos with mucho sol
Instalar equipo sobredimensionado (cicla mucho, not deshumidifica bien)
description: Calculate AC cooling capacity in BTU.
rc: For a room of {area} m², the recommended cooling capacity is approximately {btu_necesarios} BTU/h.
fd: BTU = area × 550 + window adjustments + occupancy adjustments
el: AC sizing for a 25 m² bedroom with one south-facing window
desc: Air Conditioning BTU Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
